name: Sesame Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 36 Chicken drumettes (bottom part of chicken wing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken pieces and pat dry. Place in a bowl.
2. Combine all ingredients except sesame seeds in a blender and puree.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken and stir to coat all pieces well.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Remove chicken from marinade and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
6. Place under broiler for 5 to 6 minutes on each side.
7. Serve hot.
